action_space.none: Reject both candidate lists and output an empty relation set.
action_space.inter: Keep only the intersection C ∩ D.
action_space.slm: Keep the full SLM candidate set D.
action_space.llm: Keep the full LLM candidate set C.
action_space.slm_top1: Keep only the highest-scoring SLM relation.
action_space.llm_top1: Keep only the first LLM relation.
action_space.llm_top2: Keep the first two LLM relations.
action_space.slm_cal: Keep only SLM relations whose score exceeds a learned relation-specific threshold.
action_space.white: Keep only LLM relations that fall into learned high-precision LLM-only type patterns.
action_space.slm_cal_plus_white: Take calibrated SLM relations and add high-precision LLM-only relations.
action_space.slm_plus_white: Take the full SLM set and add high-precision LLM-only relations.
action_space.slm_plus_llm_top1: Take the SLM set and add the top LLM relation.
action_space.inter_plus_llm_top1: Take the overlap and then add the top LLM relation.
